name: Tom Waits
abstract: Thomas Alan Waits (born December 7, 1949) is an American singer, songwriter, composer and actor. His lyrics often focus on society's underbelly and are delivered in his trademark deep, gravelly voice.

works_created.t: The Piano Has Been Drinking (Not Me)

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: I said, “Mr. Waits, how do you do?” And he said, “I’m with Leon Redbone’s entourage.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997
